message:
feat(ftui-core): thread Cx through all Ring 1 terminal I/O operations (bd-1q5.18)

Add Cx-aware variants of every TerminalSession I/O method: poll_event_cx,
read_event_cx, show_cursor_cx, hide_cursor_cx, set_mouse_capture_cx,
size_cx, and flush_cx. Each variant respects Cx deadline/cancellation,
emits a tracing span ('terminal.io') with op_type, cx_deadline_remaining_us,
and cx_cancelled fields, and records I/O duration metrics (read/write/flush
counters). 10 new unit tests covering helpers, metrics accessors, and
Cx-cancelled early returns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
